CREATE TABLE procedure_coverage (id INT PRIMARY KEY, coverage_data ARRAY);
INSERT INTO procedure_coverage (id, coverage_data) VALUES (1, ARRAY[1, 0, 1]);
INSERT INTO procedure_coverage (id, coverage_data) VALUES (2, ARRAY[0, 1, 1]);
SELECT coverage_data[1] FROM procedure_coverage WHERE id = 2;
UPDATE procedure_coverage SET coverage_data = ARRAY[1, 1, 1] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM procedure_coverage WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM procedure_coverage WHERE coverage_data[2] = 1);
SELECT MAX(coverage_data[2]) FROM (SELECT coverage_data FROM procedure_coverage) AS temp;
SELECT id, coverage_data FROM procedure_coverage WHERE ARRAY_LENGTH(coverage_data) = 3;
SELECT id FROM procedure_coverage WHERE coverage_data @> ARRAY[1, 1];
INSERT INTO procedure_coverage (id, coverage_data) VALUES (3, ARRAY[1, 0, 0]);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedure_coverage WHERE coverage_data IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE procedure_coverage SET coverage_data = ARRAY_APPEND(coverage_data, 1) WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, ARRAY_PREPEND(1, coverage_data) AS new_coverage FROM procedure_coverage WHERE id = 1;
